name: agentic-workflow-framework
description: Multi-agent orchestration conventions: orchestrator mode, 10 subagent roles, slash commands, hooks.

hooks.command: if [ -d .localdev/workflow ]; then found=0; if grep -qE '^## [0-9]{4}-' .localdev/workflow/blockers.md 2>/dev/null; then echo 'Active blockers: .localdev/workflow/blockers.md'; found=1; fi; for f in .localdev/workflow/handoffs/*.md; do [ -e "$f" ] && { mtime=$(stat -f %m "$f" 2>/dev/null || stat -c %Y "$f" 2>/dev/null); mtime=${mtime:-$(date +%s)}; age=$(( ( $(date +%s) - mtime ) / 86400 )); if [ "$age" -gt 7 ]; then echo "Open handoff: $f (age: ${age}d) — stale, resume or absorb into done.md"; else echo "Open handoff: $f (age: ${age}d)"; fi; found=1; }; done; if grep -qE '^## \[(doing|blocked)\]' .localdev/workflow/todo.md 2>/dev/null; then echo 'Open tasks: .localdev/workflow/todo.md'; found=1; fi; if [ "$found" -eq 0 ]; then echo 'agentic: armed'; fi; fi
